Austin-Based & Texas-Focused

We're a local Texas investment company, not a national call center. When you reach out, you're talking to someone who knows your market and your situation.

What We Offer Is What You Keep

No agent commissions. No closing costs. No repair bills. Our cash offer is your take-home number.

💬

We'll Always Be Straight With You

If selling to us isn't your best move, we'll tell you — and point you toward options that are.

Simple Process

Three Steps to a Done Deal

No showings. No open houses. No waiting 90 days. Just three simple steps from today to closed.

1

Tell Us About Your Home

Fill out the form below or give us a call. Takes less than 2 minutes — no personal details needed yet.

Under 2 minutes
2

Get Your Cash Offer

We review your property and call you back with a no-obligation cash offer — usually within 24 hours.

Within 24 hours
3

Pick Your Closing Date

You choose the date. We use cash — no lender, no appraisal, no financing delays. Tell us your timeline and we'll work around it.

You set the date

We Work With Texas Homeowners in All Kinds of Situations

You don't have to be in crisis to work with us. We help homeowners who simply want a faster, simpler way to sell — no listings, no showings, no waiting.

🏚️ Facing foreclosure or missed mortgage payments

📋 Going through divorce or probate

👴 Inherited a property you don't want to keep

🏃 Relocating and need to sell on a tight timeline

💸 Behind on property taxes or dealing with liens

🔧 Property needs major repairs you can't or don't want to handle

🏦 Want to skip the realtor and sell directly for cash

😓 Just need a clean exit — fast

Whatever your situation, the first step is a free, no-pressure conversation. We'll listen, walk you through your options, and give you a straight answer.

Talk to Us — It's Free
Side-by-Side

Cash Offer vs. Listing with an Agent

See how a direct sale stacks up — honestly.

🏠 U.S. Home Solutions Traditional Agent
Closing timeline Weeks, not months 60–90+ days
Repairs required ✔ None — sell as-is ✖ Usually required
Agent commission ✔ $0 ✖ 5–6% of sale price
Closing costs ✔ We cover them ✖ Paid by seller
Showings & open houses ✔ None ✖ Yes — ongoing
Deal falls through risk ✔ No financing contingency ✖ 15–20% fall-through rate
Certainty of close ✔ Guaranteed ✖ Not guaranteed

A cash offer may be below market value. We'll be upfront if listing with an agent nets you more — and we'll tell you either way.

Know Your Rights

Before You Do Anything — Know Your Options

Most homeowners facing foreclosure don't know they have choices. Here are the 5 paths available to you:

Reinstate the Loan

Catch up on missed payments before the auction date. This keeps you in the home. We can walk you through whether this is realistic for your situation.

Loan Modification

Work with your lender to restructure your payments. Takes time — and lenders don't always say yes — but worth exploring.

Sell Fast to an Investor

Get a cash offer, close on your timeline, walk away without repairs or agent fees. This is what we do — and we'll be upfront if it's not your best option.

List with an Agent

If you have enough equity and time before auction, a traditional sale may net you more. We'll tell you honestly if this fits your situation.

Let It Go

Sometimes foreclosure or a deed-in-lieu is the cleanest exit. We'll explain what that means for your credit and your future.

Next Steps

Whatever path makes sense, the first step is a conversation with someone who understands Texas foreclosure law and your situation. That's what the call below is for.

Common Questions

Straight Answers

A cash offer is typically below retail market value — because we're buying as-is, paying closing costs, and closing fast. We'll always be transparent about our number and how we got there. If listing with an agent would net you more after repairs and commissions, we'll tell you that honestly.
We can still help. We work with sellers who are underwater on their mortgage. Depending on your situation, options may include a short sale negotiation with your lender or other solutions. The first step is a conversation — we'll map out what's possible.
No. You can get a cash offer with zero commitment. We'll talk, look at the property details, and give you a number. If you like it, we move forward. If not, you walk away — no pressure, no paperwork, no obligation.
Faster than a traditional sale — because we use cash, there's no lender, no appraisal, and no financing approval to wait on. The timeline depends on your situation and when you're ready. We work around your schedule, not ours.
No repairs, no cleaning, no staging. We buy homes exactly as they sit. Leave what you don't want — we'll handle the rest.

Let's Look at Your Options Together

Free call. No obligation. We'll give you a straight answer — even if that answer is "don't sell to us."

Thanks for Your Interest

We work directly with property owners or authorized decision-makers. If you'd like to refer the owner to us, please have them reach out directly.

🔒 Your info is private. We never sell or share it.

✅ We'll Be in Touch Soon

Thanks for reaching out. Someone from our team will call or text you shortly — no pressure, ever.

Important Disclosure: U.S. Home Solutions, LLC is a real estate investor. We purchase properties and may assign our purchase contract to another buyer for a fee. We are not a real estate agent or broker. This is not legal or financial advice. Please consult with a qualified attorney or financial advisor regarding your specific situation.
